response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory 5–10 years of professional C++ development experience on the Windows platform, with the closest relevant experience being C/C++ work at National Instruments (2014–2015) which is over 8 years ago and not focused on capital markets or fixed income systems. While the resume highlights strong software engineering skills in other languages and domains, it does not demonstrate domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking. The absence of SQL Server/Oracle experience further reduces alignment with the role's requirements.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with experience in multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to work in fast-paced, modern development environments (Stripe, Shopify)
Open source contributions and community involvement (geodata platforms, workshops)
concerns: No recent or extensive C++ experience on Windows platform required for the role
Lacks domain expertise in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income systems
No demonstrated experience with SQL Server or Oracle databases as required
